gates.evidence: Plan, install, repair, and uninstall smoke test passes in an isolated root.
Release contains SPDX SBOM and SHA-256 inventory.
The bundled bridge is ArchFlow Apache-2.0 source and its reproducible source-to-binary hash is locked.
Reproducible ArchFlow RBZ build passes; obtain and verify a SketchUp Extension Warehouse signature.
Pure-standard-library ArchFlow MCP stdio server is declared through Plugin .mcp.json and tested against a mock local bridge.
Track and reverse every CAD, SketchUp, and Codex configuration mutation.
Build and timestamp a signed MSI/EXE with a trusted publisher identity.
Pass clean-machine tests for every advertised CAD and SketchUp version.
Publish privacy, security, support, and responsible-use policies.
